title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Adobe India Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Adobe India Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Adobe India Holdings Services in Noida offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Adobe India Holdings Services:
Adobe India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adobe India Holdings Services!
